title: Gala Games - Rekt
relevance_summary: Access control exploit involving unauthorized minting of tokens

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints a large amount of tokens from a dormant account

red_flags: Unauthorized minting of a large amount of tokens
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints a large amount of tokens from a dormant account
summary: A hacker exploited an access control vulnerability to mint 5 billion GALA tokens, worth $216 million, by gaining control of a dormant MINTER account. A guard could have detected and blocked this by monitoring for large mint transactions from dormant accounts.
